What Scrappy Is

CLOSING
THE LOOP
IN PUBLIC.

Scrappy is a live research and development project exploring how autonomous robotics can recover eligible drink containers in busy public venues, diverting them from landfill and helping build a smarter circular economy.

The project innovation is being created by Shrunk Innovation Group.

A first prototype has been deployed in a live environment at QPAC. A second prototype is being deployed soon, to gather more learnings and refine the engineering design.

Stay tuned for more updates.

01

Computer Vision

An overhead camera scans the tray, and a custom-trained AI model detects and classifies eligible containers, cans and plastic bottles, in real time.

02

AI Decision Making

The system works out each can or bottle's location and provides the robot with instructions on how best to grab it.

03

Robotic Retrieval

A robotic arm picks each container and places it into the recycling stream, fully autonomously.
